/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/STWPX/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER GABRIEL ALCARAZ/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - NARCOTICS EVIDENCE ENVELOPE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1A - PLASTIC BAGGIE CONTAINING 5 SMALL WHITE ROCKS AND WHITE POWDER SUBSTANCE/EXHM:DEFENSE A - PHOTOCOPY OF 5 TWENTY DOLLAR BILLS ON 8X11 PAPER/EXHM:DEFENSE B - PHOTOCOPY OF 1 TWENTY DOLLAR BILL ON 8X11 PAPER/X:DURING CROSS-EXAMINATIONOFFICER ALCARAZ ASSERTS A CONFIDENTIALITY PRIVILEGE AS TO DISCLOSING THE DISTANCE BETWEEN HIM AND DEFENDANT AT THE  TIME OF INCIDENT,/X:AS SUCH, THECOURT HOLDS AN IN CAMERA HEARING IN CHAMBERS WITH THE OFFICER,/X:CROSS-EXAMINATION OF OFFICER ALCARAZ RESUMES BY THE PUBLIC DEFENDER,  THE COURT INSTRUCTS OFFICER ALCARAZ TO DISCLOSE HIS LOCATION AT THE TIME OF THE INCIDENT,/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THEOFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:001/X:DEFENDANT REMAINS OUT OF CUSTODY ON HIS OWN RECOGNIZANCE WITH SPR CHECK-IN REQUIREMENTS MODIFIED TO ONCE WEEKLY IN PERSON AND 4 TIMES WEEKLY BY PHONE,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/
